tools.name: continuousProject.addDocument

tools.description: Save/collect analytics data from Active widget

tools.name: continuousProject.complete
tools.description: Complete continuous project

tools.name: continuousProject.completeContinuousDocument
tools.description: Complete a continuous project document. Per your project settings, a continuous project document can be target language-specific or project-wide for all target languages of the project.

tools.name: continuousProject.completeLanguage
tools.description: Complete continuous project language

tools.name: continuousProject.createActiveWidget
tools.description: Create a new widget for your Active project to be used in your website. Most website-specific configuration is provided via widgets. This does not create a new Active project, just a separate widget.

tools.name: continuousProject.createContinuousProject
tools.description: Create a new continuous project for your software, website, CI/CD translation needs.

tools.name: continuousProject.createSubscription
tools.description: Create subscription for continuous project

tools.name: continuousProject.deleteActiveWidget
tools.description: Delete a single widget for this Active project

tools.name: continuousProject.deleteContinuousProject
tools.description: Delete an existing continuous project. Your project will be cancelled, and you will still be charged for the amount of translations we have done for you so far.

tools.name: continuousProject.deleteSubscription
tools.description: Delete subscription for continuous project

tools.name: continuousProject.getActiveWidget
tools.description: View the details of an Active widget to be used in your website. Most website-specific configuration is provided via widgets.

tools.name: continuousProject.getActiveWidgets
tools.description: View a list of widgets in your Active project to be used in your website. Most website-specific configuration is provided via widgets.

tools.name: continuousProject.getAnalyticsToken
tools.description: Get JWT token to be used in analytics dashboards

tools.name: continuousProject.getContinuousProject
tools.description: View the details of a continuous project.

tools.name: continuousProject.getContinuousProjectDocument
tools.description: View the details of a source document in continuous translation project.

tools.name: continuousProject.getContinuousProjectDocumentProgress
tools.description: Monitor the translation progress of a document in a continuous project in real-time.

tools.name: continuousProject.getContinuousProjectDocuments
tools.description: View the documents under this continuous project

tools.name: continuousProject.getContinuousProjectInvoices
tools.description: Get real-time access to a continuous project's invoices.

tools.name: continuousProject.getContinuousProjectProgress
tools.description: Monitor the translation progress of an ongoing continuous project in real-time.

tools.name: continuousProject.getContinuousProjects
tools.description: View a list of continuous projects under your account. Continuous projects are those that are constantly updated, such as a CI/CD project, software project, website translation and such.

tools.name: continuousProject.getQuoteForDocument
tools.description: Get a new quote for provided document in continuous project. Per your project settings, a continuous project document can be target language-specific or project-wide for all target languages of the project.

tools.name: continuousProject.getQuoteForDocuments
tools.description: Get a new quote for provided documents in continuous project

tools.name: continuousProject.getQuoteForLanguage
tools.description: Get a new quote for provided target language in continuous project

tools.name: continuousProject.getQuoteForLanguages
tools.description: Get a new quote for provided target languages in continuous project

tools.name: continuousProject.getSubscription
tools.description: Get subscription for continuous project

tools.name: continuousProject.postContinuousProjectDocumentProgress
tools.description: Get continuous project document progress for multiple IDs

tools.name: continuousProject.resetActiveWidgetToken
tools.description: Reset the public token used with your Active widget. This token is used when communicating from your environment to MotaWord systems for translation, analytics and meta.

tools.name: continuousProject.translate
tools.description: Instantly translate your content with your existing TM and MT resources. This is the primary endpoint to translate your files and content on the fly, especially in CI/CD environments. This is a complex endpoint that is configured in your Active or Continuous Project dashboards. For instance, you can configure whether to use your TM, or translate missing strings via MT and then post-edit those new translations. There are various scenarios you can establish via a set of configurations.

tools.name: continuousProject.updateActiveWidget
tools.description: Update Active widget settings.

tools.name: continuousProject.updateContinuousProject
tools.description: Update the details and settings of continuous project.

tools.name: continuousProject.updateDocument
tools.description: Update source document in your continuous project. In most scenarios, this operation will also trigger auto-translation of your document, via MT and/or TM.

tools.name: continuousProject.updateSubscription
tools.description: Update subscription for continuous project

tools.name: continuousProject.updateSubscriptionPaymentMethod
tools.description: Update subscription payment method for continuous project

tools.name: corporate.getAvailableCorporatePermissions
tools.description: View a list of available permissions for your corporate account. They are used when assigning permissions to your corporate users.

tools.description: Get a list of available permissions for this corporate account. They are used when assigning permissions to corporate users.

tools.name: corporate.getCorporate
tools.description: View the details of the corporate account that your user account belongs to.

tools.description: Get details of this corporate account

tools.description: View a list of user groups under my corporate account. User groups are a part of our RBAC implementation and can be used to configure complex permission scenarios.

tools.description: Get a list of user groups for this corporate account

tools.description: View a list of users under your corporate account. This endpoint will only return information if your user account is permitted to view corporate account users, configured by your administrator.

tools.description: Get a list of users for this corporate account

tools.description: Create or update a user under your corporate account. This endpoint requires permissions for corporate user management, configured by your administrator.

tools.name: corporate.saveCorporateUserGroup
tools.description: Create or update a corporate user group

tools.name: corporate.saveCorporateUserGroupById
tools.description: Create or update a corporate user group for this corporate account

tools.name: document.getAllDocumentSubjects
tools.description: Get a list of subjects of projects

tools.name: document.getDocuments
tools.description: View a list of files and documents that you have translations for. This endpoint lets you view your MotaWord account as a multilingual translated file repository, without needing to go through your projects to interact with files in them.

tools.description: Find documents similar to this document. Optionally, include translation information.

tools.description: Get a list of your documents

tools.name: document.regeneratePreview
tools.description: Regenerate preview and return preview URL for given file

tools.description: Use the translation of given source manual document as manual draft source for the given target document.

tools.name: document.useAsRegular
tools.description: Use the translation of the given manual document as a regular file.

tools.name: glossary.createGlossary

tools.name: glossary.deleteGlossary
tools.description: Delete the existing glossary from the project.

tools.name: glossary.downloadGlobalGlossary
tools.description: Download your corporate account's global glossary. This endpoint is available only for corporate account customers. This glossary will be automatically attached to each new project under your account.

tools.name: glossary.downloadGlossary
tools.description: Download a previously uploaded glossary file.

tools.name: glossary.getGlossaries
tools.description: View a list of glossaries previously uploaded to the project.

tools.description: View the details of a glossary file uploaded to a project.

tools.name: glossary.updateGlobalGlossary
tools.description: Update your corporate account's global glossary. This endpoint is available only for corporate account customers. This glossary will be automatically attached to each new project under your account.

tools.name: glossary.updateGlossary
tools.description: Update the existing glossary file in the project. Public users are allowed to have only 1 glossary per project and file name and contents will replaced with the new glossary file that you are uploading via this endpoint.

tools.name: payment.deleteCreditCard

tools.name: payment.resetCardPaymentCode
tools.description: Reset the payment code used to bypass credit card payment. This will invalidate your current payment code and your users should be aware of this change while ordering translations.

tools.name: payment.resetCorporatePaymentCode
tools.description: Reset your corporate account's payment code to bypass credit card payment. This will invalidate your current payment code and your users should be aware of this change while ordering translations.

tools.name: payment.toggleCorporateAutoCharge
tools.description: Toggle (enable/disable) automatic charges on the credit card on file.

tools.name: project.assignCm
tools.description: Assign a CM to the project

tools.name: project.cancelProject
tools.description: If you haven't launched your translation project yet, we will delete it. If MotaWord already started working on your project, we will cancel the project and refund the volume that we haven't worked on yet.

tools.name: project.createProject
tools.description: Create a new translation project. Projects are not launched (you are not charged) until you `/launch` the created project.

tools.name: project.deleteProject
tools.description: If you haven't launched your translation project yet, we will delete it. If MotaWord already started working on your project, we will cancel the project and refund the volume that we haven't worked on yet.

tools.name: project.deliverProject
tools.description: Deliver project to the owner of the project. You can also download your translations in `/package` and `/download` endpoints.

tools.name: project.download
tools.description: Download the latest translation package. You must have requested a `/package` call beforehand and wait until the packaging status is 'completed'.

tools.name: project.downloadHtmlInvoice
tools.description: Download your project invoice as HTML. This is useful when you want to show your users the invoice in a webpage.

tools.name: project.downloadLanguage
tools.description: Download the latest translation package for your target language. You must have requested a `/package` call beforehand and wait until the packaging status is 'completed'.

tools.name: project.downloadPdfInvoice
tools.description: Download your project invoice as PDF. Your invoice may be in "unpaid" status, in which case youn can see the payment instructions in the PDF file.

tools.name: project.getInvoice
tools.description: View your invoice details for your translation project.

tools.name: project.getProgress
tools.description: Monitor the translation progress of an already launched project in real-time.

tools.name: project.getProject
tools.description: View the details of a translation project in your account.

tools.name: project.getProjects
tools.description: View the translation projects ordered in your account. If you have the related permission (configured by your account administrator), you can view the projects of your colleagues under the same company account.

tools.name: project.getProjectVendors
tools.description: Get a list of vendors.

tools.name: project.getQuoteIdFromInternalId
tools.description: Get Quote Id

tools.name: project.getVendorProjects

tools.name: project.getVendorProjectsByUserId
tools.description: Get a list of user/vendor projects

tools.description: Launch your translation project so MotaWord can actually start working on your translation.

tools.description: Package the translations in your project, prepare translated documents and make it ready to be downloaded. Once packaged, you can download your translated project.

tools.name: project.packageLanguage
tools.description: Package the translations in your project for a specific target language, prepare translated documents and make it ready to be downloaded. Once packaged, you can download your translated project in this target language.

tools.name: project.recreateProject
tools.description: Recreate your translation project from scratch. This is a risky action, you will lose current translations.

tools.name: project.sendQuoteEmail
tools.description: Send a quote email

tools.name: project.submitProjectReports
tools.description: Submit feedback report for a project

tools.description: Track the packaging status of your translations, by using the `key` from packaging request. Once packaging is completed, you can download your translations via `/download` endpoints.

tools.description: Trigger a call to your callback URL related to this project.

tools.description: Update project info and settings

tools.description: Clear/delete continuous project translation cache.

tools.name: strings.getContinuousProjectFileStrings
tools.description: View the strings from a document and their translations in your continuous translation project, for all target languages. If you need the translated version of your source document/file, then you need to use package and download endpoints.

tools.name: strings.getContinuousProjectStrings
tools.description: View the strings and their translations in your continuous translation project, for all target languages. If you need the translated version of your source document/file, then you need to use package and download endpoints.

tools.name: strings.getDocumentTranslations
tools.description: View the strings and their translations in your translation project for the specified source document. The list of translations is live if your project is not completed yet. If you need the translated version of your source document/file, then you need to use package and download endpoints.

tools.name: strings.getDocumentTranslationsForLanguage
tools.description: View the strings and their translations in the given target language for the specified source document. The list of translations is live if your project is not completed yet. If you need the translated version of your source document/file, then you need to use package and download endpoints.

tools.name: strings.getProjectStrings
tools.description: View the strings and their translations in your translation project, for all target languages. The list of translations is live if your project is not completed yet. If you need the translated version of your source document/file, then you need to use package and download endpoints.

tools.name: strings.getProjectStringsForLanguage
tools.description: View the strings and their translations in your translation project for the specified target language. The list of translations is live if your project is not completed yet. If you need the translated version of your source document/file, then you need to use package and download endpoints.

tools.name: strings.getProjectTranslations
tools.description: Deprecated. Use /projects/{projectId}/strings instead.

tools.name: strings.getProjectTranslationsForLanguage
tools.description: Deprecated. use /projects/{projectId}/strings/{language} instead.

tools.name: strings.getStrings
tools.description: Get a list of all strings and their translations under your account, from all projects. This is your MotaWord translation memory. If you have the related permission, this endpoint will also return strings from your company account.

tools.name: strings.getTranslationCache
tools.description: MotaWord caches your account intensively (and in a smart way) in real-time translation environments. This endpoint will return the currently cached strings and translations in your continuous translation project.

tools.name: strings.packageProjectTranslationMemory
tools.description: Package and download project translation memory in TMX format

tools.name: strings.packageProjectTranslationMemoryForLanguage
tools.description: Package and download project translation memory in TMX format for a specific target language.

tools.description: Check translation memory packaging status for async packaging requests, using the key returned from strings/package call.

tools.description: Check translation memory packaging status for async packaging requests, using the key returned from strings/package call.

tools.name: strings.packageUserTranslationMemory
tools.description: Package and download account translation memory in TMX format. If you have the related permission, this will also download your company translation memory.

tools.name: strings.packageUserTranslationMemoryForLanguageStatus
tools.description: Check translation memory packaging status for async packaging requests, using the key returned from strings/package call.

tools.name: strings.postContinuousProjectFileStrings
tools.description: Get a list of strings and its translations in the project.

tools.name: strings.postStrings
tools.description: Deprecated, use instant translation mechanism for continuous projects.

tools.description: Recache translations for the continuous project.

tools.description: Update the translation of a string from your account strings/translation memory.
